title: Modern Creator
body:
# Modern Creator

**Modern Creator** is a modern-style furniture mod with a **playable music system**.
This release is a **backport for 1.12.2**, updated with a large sound library (~**580** tracks) and the core furniture/decor set.

## Highlights

* 🎵 **Playable instruments** – guitar, electric guitar, bass, piano, drums. Multiple libraries (acoustic/metal/rock/bass/drum) for rich, realistic tone.
* 🛋️ **Modern furniture set** – refrigerator, sofa, living table, chair, counter (top/bottom), curtain, door, louver, showcase, multiple lamps (table/wall/top/high).
* 🚿 **Bathroom set** – bathtub and **shower** with dedicated SFX.
* 🌹 **Bottle-flower decor (reserve series)** – allium, daisy, dandelion, houstonia, orchid, rose, tulip (red/white/orange/pink) plus a water bottle for displays.
* 🔔 **Utility items** – home ring (doorbell), craft “hammer” SFX, creative tools.
* 🌐 **Language** – includes `en_us`.

> Note: Some minor variants from the 1.20.1 line are intentionally simplified for **stability and performance** on 1.12.2.

## Quick Start

* Furnish your house or studio with the modern set.
* Use instruments to play notes using the bundled sound libraries.
* Decorate with the **reserve_*** bottle-flower series.
* Try the **shower** for ambient sound effects.

## Compatibility

* **Minecraft 1.12.2 + Forge**.
* Works well alongside common mods. If **RealSurvivor** is installed, certain internal systems are detected automatically.

## Performance

* Resources reorganized for 1.12.2; unnecessary variants trimmed; sound mappings optimized to reduce load and improve FPS.

Enjoy building modern interiors and making music in Minecraft—and share your screenshots with us!
